reference: Hello! My granddaughter, Niah, is sixteen months old. The other night, my daughter woke up and found Niah choking on thick vomit. My daughter said the thickness and texture were similar to that of a cat's hairball. This is not the first time she has choked on her vomit, but when my daughter took her to the doctor, she said this is normal? We are both worried - I have never heard of this happening to anyone else before. Do you have any idea what could be causing this or if it is serious?
